_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: AU Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. Pending labels still require project-owner approval before promotion-ready status.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: AU Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after AU Stage B precision guards

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: collected and used only for agreed purposes
not combined with behavioural analytics for advertising without consent
identification checks will be conducted without storing copies of identity documents
redaction applied to health and credit information unless strictly necessary
no public attribution of outage root cause may be made before authorised disclosure by the client
must be declined and forwarded to the client’s authorised spokesperson

Cybersecurity data (security event logs, intrusion traces, and simulated incident drills) will be processed only for detection and response; actual cyber incidents will be handled under confidential breach playbooks and embargoed announcements consistent with Australian listing rules.

Retention: recruitment files are kept 12 months post-process, payroll and superannuation records for 7 years, insider lists and related approvals for at least 7 years from the end of the relevant project, and security logs for 18 months unless needed for an investigation.
